## Additional Features - **Building Collision** — A buildings index is included for all non-filtered buildings, assigning each a flat foundation depth of **−10 m** in-game. This provides underground collision geometry so that tunnels interact correctly with building footprints. - **Neighborhood Labels** — Three layers of place name labels are embedded in the map: - _City labels_ — Major city names at the metropolitan scale. - _Municipality labels_ — Names of all obce within the map boundary. - _Neighborhood labels_ — Basic settlement unit names (ZSJ — _základní sídelní jednotka_) from RUIAN cadastral data. ## Methodology This map is generated through a six-phase pipeline that transforms Czech government census and employment statistics into georeferenced origin/destination demand points. **Point Seeding:** Candidate points are placed within each _obec_ (municipality) using population-weighted centroids derived from GHS-POP 100 m population grid data (JRC Global Human Settlement Layer R2023A). **Mesh Reconciliation:** Initial point populations are refined by solving a constrained convex optimization that approximates each point's mass to residential and economic mesh ideals while preserving CZSO 2021 Census (Sčítání lidu, domů a bytů 2021) totals for each obec. **Aggregation:** A global scaling factor reconciles the mismatch between boundary-captured employed residents (from Sčítání 2021) and workplace employees (from CZSO employment statistics). **Commute Assignment:** Commute flows are assigned directly from _DojizdkovyProud_ — the official 2021 Census O/D commuter flow table at _ZSJ-díl_ (sub-municipal) granularity. **Special Demand Injection:** Non-commuter demand generators — airports, universities, major sports facilities, libraries, and tourism attractions — are injected as an additive layer. Airport demand from Czech CAA (ÚCL) statistics; university demand from MŠMT DSIA F21 faculty enrollment; attraction demand from tourdata.cz visitor counts across all 14 Czech kraje (~1,800 attractions). Sports arena demand derived from per-club average attendance × home matches; library demand from per-library _návštěvníci_ counts in operator výroční zprávy and NIPOS aggregates. **Layout Reconciliation:** A final spatial pass resolves point overlaps and ensures map clickability while keeping special-demand locations fixed. ## Data Sources All demand modeling is derived from freely available Czech government statistical datasets and public geospatial resources. - **2021 Census** (Sčítání lidu, domů a bytů 2021 / SLDB 2021) — [ČSÚ / CZSO](https://www.czso.cz/) - **Commute O/D at ZSJ-díl level** (DojizdkovyProud) — [ČSÚ / CZSO](https://www.czso.cz/) - **Workplace Employment Statistics** (Počet obsazených pracovních míst) — [ČSÚ Geodata](https://geodata.statistika.cz/) - **100 m Population Grid** (GHS-POP R2023A) — [JRC / EU Copernicus](https://ghsl.jrc.ec.europa.eu/) - **Cadastral Boundaries** (RUIAN — Registr územní identifikace, adres a nemovitostí) — [ČÚZK](https://www.cuzk.cz/) - **Faculty Enrollment Data** (MŠMT DSIA F21) — [MŠMT](https://dsia.msmt.cz/) - **Airport Passenger Statistics** — [ÚCL / Czech CAA](https://www.caa.cz/statistiky) - **Tourism Visitor Statistics** — [tourdata.cz / CzechTourism](https://tourdata.cz/) - **Library Visitor Statistics** — [NIPOS Statistika kultury](https://www.statistikakultury.cz/) + per-library výroční zprávy - **Football League Attendance** (Chance Liga + Chance národní liga) — [chanceliga.cz](https://www.chanceliga.cz/statistiky-rekordy) - **Ice Hockey League Attendance** (Tipsport Extraliga + Chance Liga) — [hokej.cz](https://www.hokej.cz/) - **Overture Maps Foundation** — [Overture](https://overturemaps.org/) ## License This map data is released under the [GNU General Public License v3.0](https://github.com/ahkimn/subwaybuilder-eu-maps/blob/main/LICENSE). ## Credits Map authored by [Yukina-](https://subwaybuildermodded.com/credits/)
